subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 744558410/240805574 is not a GRB
body:
M. Godwin (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 744558410/240805574 at 13:46:45.32 UT
on 05 August 2024, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to a Solar Flare"
